1_auth.description: Authentication endpoints (no auth required except logout)

1.1_register.notes: Sets role=null by default. Admin must update role later. Sets refresh_token as HTTP-only cookie.

email.notes: Can be email address OR phone number

1.2_login.notes: 2FA required for roles: manager, accountant, auditor. Sets refresh_token cookie.

otp_code.notes: Only returned when DEBUG=True. In production, OTP is emailed.

1.3_request_otp.notes: OTP expires in 5 minutes. Token signed with TimestampSigner (max age 180s). OTP sent via email.

1.4_verify_otp.notes: OTP max 5 attempts. Sets refresh_token cookie. Marks OTP as used.

1.5_refresh.auth: None (reads refresh token from HTTP-only cookie)
1.5_refresh.notes: Reads refresh_token from cookie only. If ROTATE_REFRESH_TOKENS is true, sets new refresh cookie. Returns 401 if cookie missing.

1.6_logout.notes: Blacklists refresh token. Deletes refresh_token cookie.

1.7_invite.notes: Sends OTP to email. User must call /api/auth/invite/verify/ with the OTP. OTP expires in 10 minutes.

1.8_invite_verify.notes: Verifies OTP, sets password + phone, activates account, returns JWT. OTP is one-time use.

1.9_enable_2fa.notes: Enables 2FA for the authenticated user. Requires current password confirmation.

response_403.detail: MANAGER/ACCOUNTANT/AUDITOR roles cannot disable 2FA. Contact an administrator.

1.10_disable_2fa.notes: Blocked for MANAGER, ACCOUNTANT, and AUDITOR roles (2FA is mandatory for them).

1.12_password_reset_request.notes: Sends password reset OTP to the user's email. OTP expires in 10 minutes.

1.13_password_reset_verify.notes: Verifies OTP and sets new password. OTP is one-time use. Max 5 attempts.

search.notes: Searches first_name, last_name, email, phone_number, role

ordering.notes: Fields: first_name, last_name, email, role, date_joined

role.notes: One of: admin, manager, accountant, grader, farmer, auditor

2.2_create.notes: cooperative_id auto-assigned from requesting user's cooperative.

2.7_me.description: Get or update current user profile

methods.notes: Cannot change own role or cooperative_id via me endpoint.

2.10_avatar_upload.notes: Uploads/updates the authenticated user's avatar. Accepts multipart/form-data.

3_cooperatives.description: Cooperative management endpoints (public list/detail, admin for mutations)

search.notes: Searches first_name, last_name, member_number, phone_number, mpesa_number

ordering.notes: Fields: first_name, last_name, member_number, date_joined, phone_number

user_id.notes: Link to existing User for login

user_email.notes: Creates User+Farmer in one go. Returns temp_password

4.2_create.notes: id_number not returned in response (removed in to_representation). decrypted_id_number field available instead.

methods.auth: Bearer — farmer (requires user linked to farmer profile)
Bearer — farmer (requires user linked to farmer profile)

4.12_memberships_update.response_200: Updated membership object (same structure as GET detail).

search.notes: Searches batch_id, farmer name, member_number, local_id

farmer.notes: Must be active and in same cooperative

5.2_create.notes: batch_id auto-generated. Triggers SMS notification to farmer via Celery.

5.7_sync.notes: Atomic transaction. All deliveries created in one go. Sends bulk SMS via Celery.

batch_id.notes: Returns batch detail with deliveries array

5.8_batches.notes: Returns paginated list when no batch_id filter. Returns single batch with deliveries when batch_id provided.

search.notes: Searches batch_id, grade_letter, farmer name, member_number

delivery.notes: Delivery must be PENDING, same cooperative, no existing grade

grade_letter.notes: A, B, C, PREMIUM, STANDARD. Cannot set with rejection_reason

rejection_reason.notes: Use instead of grade_letter for rejection. Cannot set with grade_letter

6.2_create.notes: Auto-updates delivery status to GRADED (or REJECTED). Triggers Celery task to update cooperative inventory.

6.4_update.notes: Syncs changes back to delivery (status, grade, rejection_reason).

6.7_override.notes: override_reason is REQUIRED. Sets is_overridden=true. Syncs delivery status. Triggers Celery inventory update.

methods.notes: unique_together on (grade_letter, effective_from). Cannot create duplicate on same date.

include_deliveries.notes: If true, includes delivery_count per farmer

8.1_map.notes: Only returns farmers with non-null lat/lng. Cooperative-scoped. Use ?include_deliveries=true to annotate delivery count.

9.1_map.notes: Falls back to farmer's lat/lng when delivery lat/lng is null (via Coalesce). Cooperative-scoped. Accepts optional ?date= and ?grade= filters.

10.1_list.notes: farmer_count is annotated via Count of distinct farmers across all stops. Paginated.

description.example: Covers Kamiti, Githunguri town, and Riara

path.notes: GeoJSON LineString. Must have at least 2 coordinates. Each coordinate is [lng, lat].

response_201.name: Githunguri Morning Route
response_201.description: Covers Kamiti, Githunguri town, and Riara

10.2_create.notes: cooperative_id auto-set from request user. Stops can be added separately via assign-stops.

response_200.name: Githunguri Morning Route
response_200.description: Covers Kamiti, Githunguri town, and Riara

10.3_detail.notes: Stops are ordered by stop_order. Farmer_ids are UUIDs of farmers assigned to that stop.

10.4_update.notes: Stops are NOT updated via PUT/PATCH — use the assign-stops endpoint for stops.

stop_order.notes: Sequential from 1, no gaps or duplicates

10.7_assign_stops.response_200: Full route detail (same as retrieve) with updated stops.
10.7_assign_stops.notes: Full replace in a transaction: deletes all existing stops, creates new ones. stop_order must be sequential from 1.

11_sales.description: Sales, buyer, and payment cycle endpoints (cooperative-scoped)

11.8_payment_cycle_create.notes: Validates no overlapping date ranges for same cooperative. Overlapping returns 400 with cycle names.

11.12_payment_cycle_delete.notes: Only DRAFT cycles can be deleted. Returns 400 for COMPUTED/LOCKED cycles.

buyer.notes: Must be active and in same cooperative

payment_cycle.notes: UUID of payment cycle to link to

11.14_sale_create.notes: invoice_number auto-generated. total_amount computed as quantity * price_per_unit. Set status=COMPLETED to trigger inventory decrement.

11.16_sale_partial_update.notes: Setting status to COMPLETED triggers Celery task to decrement inventory. CANCELLED reverses it.

11.17_sale_update.notes: total_amount recomputed as quantity * price_per_unit. Only quantity, price_per_unit, status, notes, invoice_number, payment_cycle are meaningful on update.

11.18_sale_delete.notes: Deletes sale record. Does not reverse inventory changes — cancel via PATCH status=CANCELLED first.

methods.notes: Creates a dispute for a specific grade. Raises PermissionDenied if farmer doesn't own the delivery.

reason.example: The quality assessment does not match my delivery

response_201.reason: The quality assessment does not match my delivery

12.2_dispute_list.response_200: Paginated list of FarmerGradeDispute objects with id, reason, status, created_at. Cooperative-scoped.

12.3_dispute_detail.response_200: FarmerGradeDispute object with id, reason, status, created_at.

resolution_notes.example: Re-grading confirmed original grade was correct

12.4_dispute_resolve.notes: Only PENDING disputes can be resolved. Sets resolved_by and resolved_at automatically.

reason.example: The quality assessment does not match my delivery

response_201.reason: The quality assessment does not match my delivery

12.5_dispute_create.notes: Alternative to POST /api/grades/{id}/dispute/. Allows manager/staff to create disputes on behalf of farmers.

12.8_dispute_delete.notes: Only PENDING disputes can be deleted.

image.notes: JPEG or PNG, max 5MB, min 300x300 pixels

methods.notes: Only the uploader or a manager can delete images.

threshold.notes: Default 100. Returns items with running_balance < threshold

14_payment_engine_actions.description: Payment engine lifecycle actions (cooperative-scoped, on PaymentCycle)

14.1_run.notes: Triggers async Celery task run_payment_engine. Returns 400 if cycle is LOCKED. Saves celery_task_id on cycle.

14.3_lock.response_200: Full PaymentCycleSerializer. Returns 400 if not COMPUTED.
14.3_lock.notes: Sets status=LOCKED, locked_by=current user, locked_at=now. Audits.

14.4_unlock.response_200: Full PaymentCycleSerializer. Returns 400 if not LOCKED.

14.6_hold.notes: Cycle must be COMPUTED or LOCKED. Sets FarmerPayment.is_on_hold=true. Audits.

14.7_release.notes: Cycle must be COMPUTED or LOCKED. Sets FarmerPayment.is_on_hold=false. Audits.

14.8_task_status.notes: Poll Celery AsyncResult for the cycle's computation task. Includes ComputationWarning records.

14.9_export.notes: CSV download: member_number, farmer_name, total_quantity_kg, gross_amount, total_deductions, withholding_tax_amount, net_amount, payment_method, payment_status. Filename: cycle_{name}_payments.csv.

15_admin.description: Admin-level auth and user management endpoints (superadmin only)

15.1_admin_invite_create.notes: Creates inactive User. Sends invite email with link to accept. Link expires in 7 days.

15.2_admin_invite_list.notes: Paginated list of invites. Filterable by email, role, and status.

15.4_admin_invite_revoke.notes: Revokes a pending invite. Cannot revoke already accepted invites.

15.5_admin_invite_resend.notes: Resends the invite email. Only works for pending (non-expired, non-revoked) invites.

21.2_create.notes: Creates an empty disbursement batch without transactions. Use initiate to populate from a payment cycle.

payment_cycle.notes: Must be a LOCKED cycle in user's cooperative

21.3_initiate.notes: Creates batch + transactions from cycle FarmerPayments (is_on_hold=false, net_amount>0). Skips farmers below minimum_payout_amount (carried forward). One transaction per farmer.

21.5_update.notes: Only notes and command_id are meaningful on update. status changes via approve/live workflows.

21.7_delete.notes: Only PENDING batches can be deleted.

21.8_approve.notes: Batch must be PENDING. Sets approved_by and approved_at. Audits.

21.9_live.notes: Batch must be PENDING. Triggers Celery task process_batch_disbursements. Saves celery_task_id.

21.10_retry_failed.notes: Resets FAILED transactions to PENDING, clears error fields. Returns 400 if no failed transactions.

21.11_csv.notes: CSV download of pending BANK transactions for bulk upload. Columns: AccountNumber, BeneficiaryName, Amount, Narration.

21.12_confirm_manual.notes: Only BANK/CASH transactions. Sets status=SUCCESS, completed_at=now. Updates FarmerPayment to PAID. Triggers update_batch_summary Celery task.

status.notes: PENDING, QUEUED, SENT, SUCCESS, FAILED, CANCELLED

17_loans.notes: Farmers see only own loans. Accountants/managers see all in cooperative. Statuses: PENDING, ACTIVE, COMPLETED, DEFAULTED.

farmer.notes: Farmers can only create loans for themselves

21.2_create.response_201: LoanDetailSerializer. Status set to PENDING (farmer) or ACTIVE (manager/accountant).
21.2_create.notes: Auto-calculates total_repayable, installment_amount from principal + interest.

21.4_update.notes: total_repayable and installment_amount auto-recalculated on save. Only PENDING loans can be meaningfully updated.

21.6_delete.notes: Deletes the loan and cascaded repayments/guarantors.

21.7_approve.notes: Validates: status must be PENDING, must have >=1 ACTIVE guarantor. Sets status=ACTIVE, approved_by, approved_at.

21.8_disburse.notes: Status must be ACTIVE. disburse_at must be null. Sets disbursed_at=now. Returns 400 if conditions not met.

guarantor_id.notes: Must be existing Farmer in same cooperative, not already a guarantor

21.9_add_guarantor.response_201: List of LoanGuarantorSerializer objects for the loan.
21.9_add_guarantor.notes: Only for PENDING loans. Creates LoanGuarantor record.

21.10_remove_guarantor.notes: Only for PENDING loans. Returns 404 if guarantor not found.

21.11_mark_completed.notes: Status must be ACTIVE. installments_paid must >= number_of_installments. Sets status=COMPLETED.

21.12_mark_defaulted.notes: Status must be ACTIVE. Sets status=DEFAULTED, appends reason to notes. Sends IN_APP notification to ACTIVE guarantors.

18_deductions.description: Deduction and farm input credit endpoints (cooperative-scoped)

cycle.notes: Cannot add deductions to LOCKED cycles

21.6_deduction_delete.notes: Deletes deduction record. Cannot restore to payment cycle after deletion.

undeducted.notes: Filter to credits not yet deducted in a cycle

21.8_farm_input_credit_create.notes: Cannot delete if already deducted in a cycle.

21.12_farm_input_credit_delete.notes: Cannot delete if already deducted in a cycle (deducted_in_cycle is not null).

search.notes: Searches resource_type, action, actor name, email, resource_id

21.2_statement_pdf.notes: Returns PDF. Farmers can only view their own statement. Staff can view any in cooperative.

21.3_statement_latest.notes: Returns PDF of last PAID FarmerPayment. 404 if no paid statements.

21.5_season_report.notes: Returns PDF season report for a specific payment cycle.

21.6_kra_report.notes: Returns PDF withholding tax report for KRA for the given year.

year.notes: 4-digit year (1900-2099). Financial year = July {year} to June {year+1}

search.notes: Searches content, channel, notification_type, status, recipient name/phone

results.content: Your delivery of 50L milk has been received.

21_chat.description: Chatbot powered by Google Gemini 2.0 Flash

message.example: How do I check my account balance?

response_200.reply: You can check your balance via USSD by dialing *384*ZAO# or through the farmer portal.

messages.content: How do I check my account balance?
You can check your balance via USSD by dialing *384*ZAO#...

22_legal.description: Legal document endpoints (terms, privacy policy, etc.)

22.1_legal_latest.notes: Returns the latest active version of a legal document by slug.

22.2_legal_versions.notes: Lists all versions of a legal document, newest first.

22.3_legal_version_detail.notes: Returns a specific version of a legal document.

22.4_legal_accept.notes: Accepts the latest active version of a legal document for the authenticated user.

22.5_legal_pending.notes: Lists all legal documents that the authenticated user has not yet accepted.
